title: trichomanes australicum
intro: Trichomanes australicum, also known as the Austral fern or Button fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Trichomanes australicum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of treatment.
